Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class SvcCatalogFulfillFlowItem

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.SvcCatalogFulfillFlowItem
public class SvcCatalogFulfillFlowItem extends Object

Java class for SvcCatalogFulfillFlowItem complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SvcCatalogFulfillFlowItem">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="catalogInputVariable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="displayType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}PropertyDisplayType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="fieldDefinition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="fieldLookupDomain" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isAdditionalQuestionsInputVariable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isRequired" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lookupDomainFieldType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="objectLookupDomain" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
